creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
The offical packages are fine.

# uname -a
FreeBSD bamd10.dinoex.sub.de 10.0-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p7 #0: Tue Jul  8 06:37:44 UTC 2014     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# pkg install graphviz
Updating repository catalogue
The following 1 packages will be installed:

        Installing graphviz: 2.36.0_6

The installation will require 8 MB more space

0 B to be downloaded

Checking integrity... done
[1/1] Installing graphviz-2.36.0_6... done

libdir = "/usr/local/lib/graphviz"

    textlayout  :  textlayout

    loadimage   :  (lib) eps gd gd2 gif jpe jpeg jpg png ps svg
